cn.trackName: 生辰 — 桌面时间小组件
cn.description:
这是一款关于生、死、心愿与延续的App。

小时候，我以为自己是不会老去的彼得·潘，却终究敌不过健康磨损，容颜老去。
时针转动，生命流逝，但每一次心跳都可以更加有力。

有时候，生命只是一连串的数字，多少年，多少月，多少小时，多少分钟。当你意识到这个时，往往陷入巨大的虚无感之中，惶恐不能自拔。
而现在，这些数字可以成为你重塑生命的坐标，指引你走向更健康、更长久的未来。

生辰 2.0 通过 AI 分析和科学判断，不仅预测生命的终点，更为你铺就延长生命的道路：

- 探索你的生命时钟：了解当下的预期寿命，直面生命的有限与珍贵。
- 发现延寿的可能：看见改变健康习惯能为你带来多少额外的生命时光。
- 聚合健康数据：自动追踪睡眠、锻炼、压力（HRV）、经期、喝水等十余种健康数据

美国诗人纳·斯待尔在87岁那年写道：
"如果我能够从头活过，我会试着犯更多的错。
我会放松一点，我会灵活一点。
我会爬更多的山，游更多的河，看更多的日落。"

因为了解生命的终点，才能更好地珍惜当下的每一刻。生辰2.0 探索健康的可能，让我们成为你健康旅程的长久伙伴。

【生辰 App 会员服务说明】

1.会员包含几种订购类型
订阅周期：1个月、3个月、12个月
2.首次订购后会通过iTunes账户直接支付；账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后自动顺延一个订阅周期
3.本服务由您自主选择是否续订，如需取消，请在订阅到期24小时前，在 AppleID 设置中取消
4.生辰App 会员协议
生辰App 会员服务协议：https://post.jellow.club/whatslife-payment/

生辰 软件许可及服务协议：https://post.jellow.club/whatslife-agreement/

【捕虫&观鸟&钓鱼！顾客愿望一次满足！】

打造露营一站式服务！开发更多露营好物，引领露营界新潮流！

【放置观看，感受小确幸】

hk.releaseNotes: - 支援 Game Center 成就
hk.description:
2022年在日本熱賣的獨立遊戲終於支援了繁體中文！
獨創的戰鬥系統和生動的點陣圖動畫，加上以現代為舞台的硬派劇情，破關後還有更多深入要素的本格派RPG！
戰鬥能以直向單手操控的簡單操作，爽快卻又充滿了深奧的戰略性，同時還包含了育成、探索、隨機強化道具的收集等豐富遊玩要素！

・存檔數量：３（保存於裝置中）
・主要故事劇情破關時間約14小時～20小時左右
・遊戲破關後深入要素可以再玩50小時～100小時以上
・遊戲內沒有課金要素

【故事劇情】
這是一個能將靈魂等概念變換為資訊的現代世界。
但作為代價，異形在各地到處出現並威脅了人們的性命。
主角們所持有的靈魂驅動器能將靈魂轉化為資訊並對抗異形，
他們為了驅除街上的異形而來到了這個城市……

【系統介紹】
將裝備中的靈魂化為資訊，組合「靈魂碎片」(手牌)來進行戰鬥。
在戰鬥中組合靈魂碎片(手牌)即可連續發出不同的招式，並且和一般的牌組構築遊戲不同的是，最多可同時控制3個角色來構築更多樣化的戰略，加上生動的點陣圖展開的精采戰鬥。

■裝備和靈魂碎片
根據裝備不同，在戰鬥中能使用的靈魂碎片(手牌)也會改變。
裝備有主武器、副武器、裝甲、裝飾品等不同部位，根據組合來決定戰鬥中能使用的牌組。

■戰技
在戰鬥中，一開始的回合只能選擇1個靈魂碎片，
但只要達成各種條件，下回合能使用的靈魂碎片就會增加。例如攻擊敵人弱點、防禦、迴避、增益、減益等行動都能增加行動次數。
同時選擇不同靈魂碎片(手牌)，根據組合即可發動各種戰技(技能)。

為了洗雪兩年前敗北的恥辱，混沌這次集結了異星的聯軍，以人類的罪孽為理由，再次襲擊地球。
就連一直捍衛人類的那位超級英雄，也決定倒戈相向。身為指揮官的你，要如何解決這個危機？人類和地球的明天，又會是如何？

遊戲介紹與特點
怪獸大進擊2，是我們在兩年前發售的好評作品，怪獸大進擊的續作。我們在保留一代的優點上，修改了缺點，並加入了許多新的特點和樂趣如下：
- 遊戲節奏更快速、更緊湊。
- 在原有的三種方塊外，新增資金方塊的蒐集使用。
- 秘密武器的部署不限一種，可部署複數種類在戰場上。
- 全新九種外星敵人，更聰明刁鑽的行為AI，提升挑戰性。
- 全新八種秘密武器，包含可三機分離、合體的超級機器人。

mo.description:
2022年在日本熱賣的獨立遊戲終於支援了繁體中文！
獨創的戰鬥系統和生動的點陣圖動畫，加上以現代為舞台的硬派劇情，破關後還有更多深入要素的本格派RPG！
戰鬥能以直向單手操控的簡單操作，爽快卻又充滿了深奧的戰略性，同時還包含了育成、探索、隨機強化道具的收集等豐富遊玩要素！

・存檔數量：３（保存於裝置中）
・主要故事劇情破關時間約14小時～20小時左右
・遊戲破關後深入要素可以再玩50小時～100小時以上
・遊戲內沒有課金要素

【故事劇情】
這是一個能將靈魂等概念變換為資訊的現代世界。
但作為代價，異形在各地到處出現並威脅了人們的性命。
主角們所持有的靈魂驅動器能將靈魂轉化為資訊並對抗異形，
他們為了驅除街上的異形而來到了這個城市……

【系統介紹】
將裝備中的靈魂化為資訊，組合「靈魂碎片」(手牌)來進行戰鬥。
在戰鬥中組合靈魂碎片(手牌)即可連續發出不同的招式，並且和一般的牌組構築遊戲不同的是，最多可同時控制3個角色來構築更多樣化的戰略，加上生動的點陣圖展開的精采戰鬥。

■裝備和靈魂碎片
根據裝備不同，在戰鬥中能使用的靈魂碎片(手牌)也會改變。
裝備有主武器、副武器、裝甲、裝飾品等不同部位，根據組合來決定戰鬥中能使用的牌組。

■戰技
在戰鬥中，一開始的回合只能選擇1個靈魂碎片，
但只要達成各種條件，下回合能使用的靈魂碎片就會增加。例如攻擊敵人弱點、防禦、迴避、增益、減益等行動都能增加行動次數。
同時選擇不同靈魂碎片(手牌)，根據組合即可發動各種戰技(技能)。

為了洗雪兩年前敗北的恥辱，混沌這次集結了異星的聯軍，以人類的罪孽為理由，再次襲擊地球。
就連一直捍衛人類的那位超級英雄，也決定倒戈相向。身為指揮官的你，要如何解決這個危機？人類和地球的明天，又會是如何？

遊戲介紹與特點
怪獸大進擊2，是我們在兩年前發售的好評作品，怪獸大進擊的續作。我們在保留一代的優點上，修改了缺點，並加入了許多新的特點和樂趣如下：
- 遊戲節奏更快速、更緊湊。
- 在原有的三種方塊外，新增資金方塊的蒐集使用。
- 秘密武器的部署不限一種，可部署複數種類在戰場上。
- 全新九種外星敵人，更聰明刁鑽的行為AI，提升挑戰性。
- 全新八種秘密武器，包含可三機分離、合體的超級機器人。

支持新版本iOS. 可下載其他語言聖經(通過設置菜單可直接顯示或隱藏不同版本聖經)。用拼音加註選中中文並可讀出。
us.description:
聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
	Application contains traditional Chinese bible and English bible for reference reading.
	可自由選擇中英對照, 繁體中文或英文聖經閱讀.


請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序.
閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.
全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕.
支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式.
使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式.
頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.
手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制.
歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

操作簡介

每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁.
雙擊頁面即可彈出控制面板. 閱讀器的操作由這一個彈出式控制面板控制, 簡單直觀方便易用.
如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比.
輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進.
退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.

us.description:
RadarScope is an AMS-award-winning weather visualization tool that empowers meteorologists, public safety officials, storm spotters, and weather enthusiasts to view a full suite of single-site radar data and related severe weather products. Your initial purchase provides professional radar visualization in a fully native app, free from distracting and invasive practices, with optional subscription packages to add even more capabilities.

Whether you’re scanning for a mesocyclone’s tell-tale hook echo, pinpointing the landfall of a hurricane’s eye wall, or identifying velocity couplet, hail spike, or debris ball signatures, RadarScope displays native radar data in its original radial format. You see what the radar sees almost as soon as the radar sees it, with automatic updates every two to ten minutes depending on the radar’s scanning strategy.

Your initial app purchase includes the following:

• Full suite of single-site radar products for the US, Canada, Guam, Denmark, Finland, and Germany
• 6-frame radar loops
• Two built-in providers for radar data
• Tornado, thunderstorm, flash flood, marine, snow squall, extreme wind, tropical, and other warnings in the US
• Selected severe weather warnings in Canada and Australia
• NWS-generated storm tracks with hail, TVS, and mesocyclone attributes
• Inspector and distance tools
• Color palette options for radar data
• AllisonHouse data plan integration
• Spotter Network integration for storm and location reporting
• mPING integration for submitting weather reports to NSSL
• Bundled maps with political boundaries, water bodies, and major highways, optimized for low-bandwidth use
• Support for widgets and complications
• Universal app for Apple platforms, including Apple Watch and Apple TV
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier One is an optional annual subscription that adds more features for tracking severe weather:

• 30-frame radar loops
• Cloud-to-ground lightning strikes
• Severe weather watches in the US and Canada
• Special weather statements in the US and Canada
• Mesoscale convective and precipitation discussions
• SPC convective, tornado, hail, wind, and fire outlooks
• WPC excessive rainfall outlooks in the US
• Local storm reports in the US
• Custom color palette support
• Multi-pane display (2 on phones; 4 on larger devices)
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier Two is an optional annual or monthly subscription that transforms RadarScope into a more complete visualization tool for a larger suite of weather products, including:

• Everything in Pro Tier One
• 50-frame radar loops
• A third provider for US radar data
• NEXRAD Level II radar data for the US with a 30-year historical archive
• Historical NEXRAD Level III, super-res, and non-US radar data with a 30-day archive
• Historical NWS bulletins with a 19-year archive
• GOES East and GOES West satellite products
• NSSL’s Multi-Radar Multi-Sensor (MRMS) products
• NCEP’s Real-Time Mesoscale Assimilation (RTMA) products
• Surface observations
• Atmospheric soundings in the US
• Hail size, hail probability, and azimuthal shear contours with a 30-day archive
• More detailed transportation and satellite imagery maps
• Custom color palette support for GOES, MRMS, and RTMA
• Server-sent events for radar and warning updates
• Cross-platform subscription sharing on up to 5 devices
• Family sharing support

If you choose to buy a RadarScope Pro subscription, it will be charged to your App Store account. The subscription will be auto-renewed within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the same price you originally paid. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal disabled via your App Store account settings after the purchase. Once purchased, the subscription cannot be canceled during the active subscription period.

DTN is committed to safeguarding your privacy online. Our privacy policy is available for review at https://www.dtn.com/privacy-policy/

Please visit our web site for more information.

us.description:
Life on Tiny Planet was calm and carefree until a great disaster occurred - Tiny Planet was hit by a meteor! The world fell apart and now its future depends only on you! Use your imagination and creativity: in order to restore Tiny Planet and help its inhabitants you will have to fix a variety of machines and mechanisms as well as solve puzzles in each of the five chapters of this game. Navigation is simple and intuitive. It doesn't distract you from the witty brain teasers, and you will be able to fully immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere of the game.

*There is no text in this game. It is fun for all ages and suitable for the whole family!
*Five vastly different chapters and over 30 exciting brain teasers (minigames)
*A bright, gorgeous world drawn entirely by hand
*Absorbing game play and simple navigation
*10 enchanting musical themes

- #1 Top Paid Apps for iOS in UK, Japan, German, Russia
- Top 10 Best Games and Top 5 Best Adventure Games of 2011 by Gamezebo
- Best Games of 2011 by GameHouse
- Top 100 Best Indie Games of 2011 by Indie DB. 
- Top 10 on Mac App Store in more countries, TOP 1 - in Japan, Russia, Taiwan, China.

Enjoy this former Apple Arcade game, now on the App Store.

CAT QUEST II is a 2D open-world action-RPG set in a fantasy realm of cats and dogs. Under threat from a continuing war between the cats of Felingard and the advancing dogs of the Lupus Empire, CAT QUEST II tells the tail of two kings, brought together against their will, on a journey of paw-some discovery to reclaim their thrones.
Play as both a cat and dog as you explore their kingdoms solo or with a friend! Quest in a world filled with magic, curious monsters, and go on a catventure like never before!

Following the success of the acclaimed CAT QUEST, developers The Gentlebros return to the world of Felingard to expand on the original with more explosive spells, expanded weapon options, an exciting new character switch mechanic, and local co-op!
Features
- Brand new story set in the world of Felingard - and beyond!- All new switch and co-op gameplay. Play as both cat and dog, either alone or with a friend!
- New weapons types – Master swords, staves and more to become a fur-midable fighter!
- More spells bring even more furry judgement to your foes.
- New passive abilities, whose attributes can be mixed and combined for endless paw-sibilities!
- Exciting, and varied dungeons filled with new traps and obstacles, making every pounce into the unknown a fresh experience!
- Em-bark on a litany of side quests, each telling its own story and expanding the lore and universe of CAT QUEST!

Go on the ultimutt catventure today!

us.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

tr.description:
Survive in endless dungeons by connecting blocks to attack, defend, and heal. Dungeon Tracer is a roguelike puzzle RPG that combines strategic turn-based combat with dungeon exploration. Connect identical blocks to unleash powerful sword attacks, shield defenses, and life-saving potions. Your decisions each turn shape the outcome of battles and your survival.

■ Recommended for
- Players who enjoy puzzle RPGs and roguelikes
- Fans of turn-based strategy combat
- Those seeking offline dungeon adventures
- Gamers who love crafting new builds and strategies through replay

■ Core Gameplay
- Connect blocks to attack, defend, and heal
- Every turn's choice impacts your strategy
- Combo effects grow stronger with longer connections
- Embrace the roguelike challenge where death means starting anew
- Develop survival strategies in ever-changing scenarios

■ In-Depth Strategic Combat
Experience the blend of intuitive block connection puzzles and the tactical depth of roguelike RPGs. Your play style varies with block placements, enemy types, skill selections, and item combinations.

■ 10 Classes and 10 Races
Each class features unique skills and traits. Combine these with racial traits for diverse builds. Experiment to find your ideal strategy.

■ Diverse Skills and Builds
Mix over 40 active skills and growth elements to create your unique combat style. Each skill and item choice leads to different outcomes.

■ Special Monsters and Block Debuffs
Face 43 unique monsters, including liches, avengers, kamikazes, and assassins. Block debuffs like freeze, fire, poison, and lock can turn the tide of battle. Simply connecting blocks won't guarantee victory.

■ Fair Roguelike Challenge
A seed-based deterministic random system ensures consistent results in each run. Enjoy a challenge where strategy and judgment outweigh luck.

■ More Fun with Repeated Growth
Skill choices evolve with each level-up
Builds focus on upgrades and items
Dungeons reconfigure with each playthrough
A structure where a single mistake heightens the tension

■ Global Leaderboard
Compete with players worldwide. Test your skills against global rankings and showcase your best scores.

■ 4 Difficulty Levels
Choose from Easy, Normal, Hard, and Very Hard
Enjoyable challenges for both newcomers and veterans.

■ Premium Offline RPG
- No ads
- No in-app purchases
- Enjoy offline play

Once purchased, access all content fully.

■ Support for Multiple Languages and Cloud Save
Supports 22 languages, ensuring you can continue your adventure seamlessly across devices.

Endless dungeons await, filled with powerful monsters and strategic choices. How long can you survive? Experience the depth of puzzle roguelike RPGs in Dungeon Tracer today!

tr.description:
Scritchy Scratchy is a super-satisfying scratch card incremental game where luck is your weapon, and glittering riches are just a scratch away.

Dive into a growing collection of scratchers, each with its own quirks, surprises, and sometimes downsides. Rip through tickets, uncover rare symbols, tweak your own luck, and chase absurd payouts.

Unlock Scratch Bot, your tireless mechanical friend who scratches and reveals the rewards for you. Turn your run into a full-blown jackpot engine as your balance shoots through the roof while you sit back and relax.

As you prosper, you’ll unlock upgrades that twist luck in your favor:
• Boosted odds and payouts
• Faster and easier scratching 
• New scratch card variants with unique rules

But power always comes with risk. Some cards tempt you with monstrous payouts at the cost of nasty penalties. Some offer steady income… others threaten your entire run. Will you play like a sensible adult or gamble like a degenerate in a neon casino?

When you’re ready for even more madness, Prestige to reset your run, gather Jack Points, and spend them on permanent upgrades that reshape your strategy. Build your own luck engine: Slow and steady, wildly explosive, or pure chaos.

pt.description:
O Genius Scan é um scanner de bolso. Digitalize rapidamente seus documentos em qualquer lugar e exporte-os como arquivos JPEG ou PDF de várias páginas.

*** Apple App of the Week *** mais de 20 milhões de usuários *** milhares de pequenas empresas ***

Posicione qualquer documento em frente à câmera do seu dispositivo: nosso aplicativo digitalizador reconhecerá o papel contra o fundo, cortará sua imagem e limpará o resultado. Você obterá uma digitalização nítida e legível. A digitalização em lote permite que você digitalize dezenas de páginas em apenas alguns segundos. Ferramentas poderosas ajudam a organizar, compartilhar ou arquivar seus documentos.

"Na próxima vez que você planejar viajar, não se esqueça de baixar uma cópia do Genius Scan para facilitar sua vida e a do departamento de contabilidade." - AppPicker.com

"Os aplicativos de câmera não foram projetados para digitalizar textos de perto, mas o Genius Scan sim." - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Pacote Genius Scan+ Premium:

- Todos os recursos premium do Genius Scan+ (indicados com + abaixo), prontos para usar (sem necessidade de atualização).

Configuração gerenciada:

- Implantação em frotas de dispositivos por uma ferramenta MDM
- Definição prévia das configurações do aplicativo por usuário (por exemplo, definir endereço de email padrão, credenciais de WebDAV/FTP)
- Controle de quais aplicativos e serviços para os quais os usuários podem exportar documentos
- Sem anúncios

== PRINCIPAIS RECURSOS == 

Digitalização inteligente:

- Detecção de documento e remoção de fundo
- Correção de distorções
- Remoção de sombras e limpeza de imperfeição
- Filtros (preto e branco, quadro branco, foto)
- Digitalização em lote

Criação e edição de PDF:

- Mescla e divisão de documentos
- Criação de PDF multipáginas
- Importação de fotos e PDF

Segurança e privacidade:

- Processamento de documentos no dispositivo
+ Face ID
+ Criptografia de senha no PDF

Organização de documentos:

- Identificação de documentos
- Pesquisa de metadados e conteúdo
+ Esquemas personalizados de nomenclatura (Smart Document Names)
+ Backup e sincronização multidispositivos da Genius Cloud (assinatura em separado)

Exporta:

- Email
+ Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV.
+ Qualquer serviço compatível com WebDAV, como Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. 
+ Exportação automática de fundo

OCR (Reconhecimento de texto):

+ Extração de texto
+ Criação de PDFs pesquisáveis
+ Leitura de cartões de visita e criação de contatos

== QUEM SOMOS ==

É no coração de Paris, na França, que The Grizzly Labs desenvolve o Genius Scan. Nos orgulhamos por criarmos aplicativos que ajudam milhões de usuários em todo o mundo, e que nos colocam nos mais altos padrões de qualidade e privacidade. Entre em contato conosco @thegrizzlylabs se tiver alguma dúvida.

== PREÇOS E LEGAIS ==

Você pode se inscrever no Genius Cloud para backup e sincronização. Nesse caso, a loja da Genius Scan exibe a duração e o preço de cada assinatura, atualizados no momento da compra. O pagamento será cobrado na conta do iTunes quando o pedido for confirmado. As assinaturas são renovadas automaticamente, a menos que a renovação automática seja desativada até 24 horas antes do final do período atual. Gerenciar assinaturas, desative a renovação automática nas configurações da conta do iTunes.

https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

pt.description:
JRPG "SOULVARS" de construção de decks está agora disponível!
15-20 horas de jogo (+50h para serem mais profundas)
Animação e batalhas dinâmicas de pixels e um rico sistema de personalização

Sem compras no aplicativo.

Embora tenham um profundo sentido estratégico, os controles verticais de smartphones helly Helly permitem batalhas simples e emocionantes, treinamento, exploração de masmorras e coleção de itens encantados aleatórios.

▼ História
Uma linha mundial na qual até o conceito de ficção da alma pode ser convertido em dados.
Em troca, a vida das pessoas é sediada pelo aparecimento repentino de deformidades.
Os protagonistas usam o Soul Driver, um dispositivo que converte almas em dados.
Eles são responsáveis ​​pelas eliminatias dessa ameaça e trabalham em uma certa cidade ...

▼ Visão geral do sistema
Número de slots de salvamento: 3 (salvo no dispositivo e salvamento manual)
Cenário estimado Tempo de compressão: 14 a 20 horas
50 a 100 mais de horas de desafio pós-claro

Características
Bits Soul (Handbills), que são o poder da alma que reside em engrenagens (equipamentos),
Os jogadores podem combiná -los em batalha fazer ataques e combos especiais de maneira sucessiva.
Os personagens são caracterizados por sua ação com pontos que se movem.

▼ equipamento e bits de alma
Os bits de alma (cartões manuais) podem ser extraídos da engrenagem (equipamento) e usados ​​como batalha de astição.
As combinações da arma principal, subweapon, armadura e acessórios
A estratégia (deck) é determinada.

▼ Artes
Durante uma batalha, apenas um bit de alma pode ser selecionado no primeiro turno, mas
O número de bits da alma pode ser selecionado no tempo aumenta, dependendo das fraquezas do oponente, guardando, evitando, fugindo, polindo e várias outras condições.
A combinação de bits de alma (cartões na mão) selecionada ao mesmo tempo ativa uma habilidade chamada Arts.
